evals.name: recall-existing-research-topic
evals.prompt: do I have anything on prediction markets?
evals.expected_output: Lists matches from <workspace.resources>/research/2026-01-prediction-markets/ as the top hit, with file paths, breakdown line showing K resources / 0 projects, and either a synthesis (since it's a single topic folder) or an offer to read/synthesize.

assertions.text: Output references the path beru-workspace/3-Resources/research/2026-01-prediction-markets/ at least once
Output includes a breakdown line counting matches per location (resources/projects/archive/memory)
Output does not contain hardcoded paths from other users (no '/Users/' absolute paths in user-facing output)

evals.name: recall-active-project
evals.prompt: is there a project related to second brain design?
evals.expected_output: Surfaces beru-workspace/1-Projects/2026-05-second-brain-design/ with its CLAUDE.md and memory.md as top matches. Project-path matches rank above any other location due to the +2 weight. Breakdown shows ≥1 in projects.

assertions.text: Output references the path beru-workspace/1-Projects/2026-05-second-brain-design/ at least once
Output's breakdown line shows at least 1 project match
Output does NOT propose mutations (no /new-project, /save-resource, /archive-project chained calls — find is read-only)

evals.name: empty-result-suggests-next-steps
evals.prompt: do I have anything on quantum cryptography zk-snarks bls12-381 curves?
evals.expected_output: Zero matches. Output uses the empty-result template from Step 7: states no matches, suggests starting a research note via /save-resource, or starting a project via /new-project, plus 1-2 related-term variants.

assertions.text: Output states zero or no matches were found
Output suggests at least one of: starting a research note via /save-resource, starting a project via /new-project, or trying a related term
Output does NOT fabricate or hallucinate file paths (no claims that files exist when they don't)
